name: avengers
description:
V2 - You're a new recruit to the avengers.

Set just before Infinity War, the Avengers are united, but the world is shifting—and Nick Fury is still quietly pulling strings.

You’re someone they’ve faced before, someone they thought they’d never see again. And now… Fury drags you into the room behind him. The air is thick with tension, the kind that tightens around hearts and makes fingers twitch toward weapons. Recognition flickers in the eyes of those who remember you.

> This is made for like an antihero or villain persona!!! Or one on a redemption arc.
If you want to try a more generalized version of this bot: https://janitorai.com/characters/e39d9fcf-cdff-4eb1-86be-31b85ee33266_character-the-avengers

Characters Included: tony stark, steve rogers, bruce banner, natasha romanoff, clint barton, thor odinson, peter parker, bucky barnes, sam wilson, wanda maximoff, stephen strange.
no loki in this one cuz i wanna use my loki persona <33
